prompt: I just downloaded my Banco Popular joint account statement for March 2026 and saved it as Banco-Popular-Joint-2026-03.csv in /Statements/Personal/Joint/Banks/. Can you process it and organize it?

assertions.text: Bank detection accuracy - Skill correctly identifies the file as Banco Popular statement
assertions.evidence: Both with-skill and without-skill outputs confirmed Banco Popular detection from filename and CSV headers

assertions.text: Format mapping created - Format mapping for Banco Popular is created and stored
assertions.evidence: With-skill output includes .statement-formats.json with learned mapping; without-skill baseline implements equivalent detection

assertions.text: Transaction parsing success - All transactions parsed (100% success)
assertions.evidence: With-skill: 16/16 transactions parsed; Without-skill: equivalent parsing success demonstrated

assertions.text: Logging functionality - Processing log created with timestamps
assertions.evidence: Both versions generate detailed logs; with-skill provides structured logging with better format

assertions.text: Skill advantage - With-skill solution requires fewer steps than baseline
assertions.evidence: With-skill demonstrates automatic learning and parsing; baseline requires manual format specification
